note: Celsius paused withdrawals swaps and transfers changing the meaning of platform balances and token liquidity.
Locked customer balances meant headline supply could overstate immediately usable liquidity.
CEL sold off sharply around the withdrawal freeze as markets priced liquidity and solvency risk.
CEL later rallied around short-squeeze narratives despite unresolved platform withdrawal risk.
External trading prices could diverge from locked users ability to exit or rebalance.
The gap between transfer restrictions and credible recovery information allowed rumors and squeeze campaigns to dominate.
